research.title: Replit’s Amjad Masad on the Cursor deal, fighting Apple, and why he’d rather not sell
research.summary: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.
research.title_zh: 复制Amjad Masad的Cursor交易，与Apple对抗，以及他为什么宁愿不卖
research.summary_zh: 该公司表示， Meta收购了人形初创公司Assured Robot Intelligence ，以加强其针对机器人的人工智能模型。
research.title_en: Replit’s Amjad Masad on the Cursor deal, fighting Apple, and why he’d rather not sell
research.summary_en: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

research.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
research.summary: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. Emails, texts, and his own tweets are surfacing in court, and there are plenty more witnesses to come. Musk’s argument against OpenAI? By converting the company to a for-profit model, Sam Altman betrayed the “nonprofit for the […]
research.title_zh: Meta收购机器人初创公司以加强其人形AI野心
research.summary_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）本周在针对OpenAI的诉讼中花了三天的大部分时间在证人席上，现在已经变得混乱不堪。电子邮件、短信和他自己的推文正在法庭上浮出水面，还有更多的证人即将到来。马斯克反对OpenAI的论点？通过将公司转变为营利模式， Sam Altman背叛了“非营利组织[…]

research.title: Did you know you can’t steal a charity? Don’t worry. Elon Musk will remind you.
research.summary: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.
research.title_zh: 您知道您不能偷窃慈善机构吗？别担心，伊隆·马斯克会提醒你。
research.summary_zh: 在与Anthropic就其人工智能模型的使用条款发生争议后，国防部加倍增加了对人工智能供应商的投资。
research.title_en: Did you know you can’t steal a charity? Don’t worry. Elon Musk will remind you.
research.summary_en: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

github.title: Moco99/OpenRelay
github.summary: 【GitHub】OpenRelay — Open source CLI tool to orchestrate multiple AI coding agents (Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Codex) with role-based hierarchy, token-aware memory, and configurable human checkpoints.  （⭐ 1）

models.title: AI News
models.summary: According to SAP, enterprise AI governance secures profit margins by replacing statistical guesses with deterministic control. Ask a consumer-grade model to count the words in a document, and it will often miss the mark by ten percent. Manos Raptopoulos, Global President of Customer Success Europe, APAC, Middle East & Africa at SAP, observes that the […] The post SAP: How enterprise AI governance secures profit margins appeared first on AI News .
models.summary_zh: 根据SAP的说法，企业AI治理通过用确定性控制取代统计猜测来确保利润率。要求消费级模型对文档中的单词进行计数，它通常会错过百分之十的标记。SAP欧洲、亚太地区、中东和非洲客户成功全球总裁Manos Raptopoulos观察到， […]后SAP ：企业AI治理如何确保利润率首先出现在人工智能新闻上。
models.summary_en: According to SAP, enterprise AI governance secures profit margins by replacing statistical guesses with deterministic control. Ask a consumer-grade model to count the words in a document, and it will often miss the mark by ten percent. Manos Raptopoulos, Global President of Customer Success Europe, APAC, Middle East & Africa at SAP, observes that the […] The post SAP: How enterprise AI governance secures profit margins appeared first on AI News .
